summary:
Agent2 recommends using the modified Widman flap over other methods because it provides necessary pocket reduction without causing excessive gum loss or severe post-operative issues, making it ideal for enhancing both esthetics and function by widening the attached gingiva. Key benefits include minimized risk of recession due to smaller surgical area involved as opposed to broader flaps which can lead to greater aesthetic concerns despite better initial results from deep cleaning alone. To summarize:

The modified Widman flap reduces pockets minimally invasive ways preserving most attachments; thus ensuring enhanced functional & cosmetic outcome avoiding major receding side-effects seen with full-thickness approaches. Sentence count matches requirement exactly at two sentences focusing purely on critical aspects pertinent here.
